themes.title: Accessibility Enhancements
themes.description: Improvements to ensure the platform is accessible to all users.

milestones.name: MVP Accessibility Features
milestones.description: Implement critical accessibility features for screen reader navigation and video player enhancements.
milestones.success_criteria: All MVP features are implemented and pass initial QA tests.

milestones.name: V1 Accessibility Improvements
milestones.description: Enhance accessibility with compliance fixes, quiz forms, and testing.
milestones.success_criteria: All V1 features are implemented, tested, and meet WCAG compliance.

milestones.name: V2 Accessibility Features
milestones.description: Collect user feedback and implement additional accessibility features.
milestones.success_criteria: User feedback is collected, and V2 features are implemented and validated.

sequencing.reason: V1 enhancements depend on the successful implementation of MVP features.
V2 features require the completion of V1 improvements to build upon the existing framework.

mvp.goal: Establish foundational accessibility features to support all users.

v1.goal: Enhance the platform's accessibility with comprehensive improvements and testing.

v2.goal: Gather user feedback and implement advanced accessibility features.
